subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached this Prisoner and We have taken note of its contents. We beseech God to graciously enable thee to attain unto His recognition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بلغ الی هذا المسجون کتابک و اطلعنا بما فیه نسئل الله بان یوفقک علی عرفانه و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @limits of the intellect, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
